name: orys
description: Pedagogical diagnostic + lesson-plan engine for the AI-mediated classroom. Built on Orys Learning Architecture™ methodology and the 10 Orys Patterns™ (de Souza, 2025). Bilingual PT/EN auto-detection. For middle school, high school, and higher-ed teachers in the USA and Brazil — aligned with IACG 2026 / CPA (Brazil higher-ed), BNCC (Brazil K-12), HLC / SACSCOC / MSCHE / WSCUC (US higher-ed), and Common Core / ESSA / state standards (US K-12).
